name: @onderling/confidential-llm
description: Phone-side confidential LLM (Objective F, invariant #7 — trust by attestation, not by host). Client verifies an enclave's SEV-SNP-style attestation report (measurement + RA-TLS channel binding + signature chain) BEFORE any prompt leaves the device; a deny-by-default gateway routes the LLM call through the attested endpoint via an injected @onderling/llm-client, and REFUSES with no silent downgrade if attestation fails. verifyChain/llm/transport are injected (mock-tested; real TEE/CVM + AMD cert chain are the deferred Fb M7/M8 deploy side).
